rationale: The citing paper uses Sorescu, Chandy, and Prabhu (2007) in core theory framing, not just a passing literature list. It is cited as prior marketing-acquisition evidence focused on internally developed resources (product capital), and the authors explicitly position their contribution as moving beyond that focus to include relational overlap and contingencies. The citation is also used in hypothesis development to justify that marketing intensity builds product capital and improves deployment of acquired resources. Even without reusing the exact model, this paper materially informs the citing paper's conceptual setup.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on prior acquisition research exemplified by Sorescu et al. (2007), which links product capital to acquisition outcomes, and extends the conversation by adding relational overlap and moderating conditions tied to resource quality and absorptive capacity.
